headline: United Rentals (URI) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know

headline: 5 Building Product Stocks to Buy Despite Industry Headwinds
summary: Tariffs, inflation and housing headwinds weigh on the industry. Yet, URI, AGX, SSD, ECG and ROAD stocks look primed to benefit from infrastructure and innovation tailwinds.
